Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Quixel\\Downloads\\Cantieri.pro\\cantierepro" && for f in \\
  "src/pages/AdminData.jsx" \\
  "src/pages/AttivitaInterne.jsx" \\
  "src/pages/Costi.jsx" \\
  "src/pages/Documenti.jsx" \\
  "src/pages/GestionePermessi.jsx" \\
  "src/pages/Imprese.jsx" \\
  "src/pages/OrdiniMateriali.jsx" \\
  "src/pages/PersoneEsterne.jsx" \\
  "src/pages/SALDashboard.jsx" \\
  "src/pages/Subappalti.jsx" \\
  "src/components/admin/RuoloDialog.jsx" \\
  "src/components/dashboard/DashboardWidgetManager.jsx" \\
  "src/components/imprese/ImpresaForm.jsx" \\
  "src/components/profilo-azienda/ProfiloAziendaForm.jsx" \\
  "src/components/sal/DocumentiSalDialog.jsx" \\
  "src/components/sal/SalForm.jsx" \\
  "src/components/cronoprogramma/GanttAvanzato.jsx" \\
  "src/components/cronoprogramma/PrimusGantt.jsx" \\
  "src/components/documenti/RicercaAvanzataDocumenti.jsx" \\
  "src/components/cronoprogramma/ImportCronoprogrammaForm.jsx"; do
  sed -i 's/bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 shadow-sm/shadow-sm/g' "$f"
  sed -i 's/ bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700//g' "$f"
  sed -i 's/bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 //g' "$f"
  sed -i 's/bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700//g' "$f"
done
echo "Done")

done
